5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch

5 0000010110 3

5 I 0

0 I 2

5 XOR 70
6 I 1
7 I 2

Applying to 00000001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 I 3 = 0
2 I 4 = 0
3 I 5 = 0
4 I 6 = 0
5 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,0) = 1
6 I 1 = 0
7 I 2 = 0

\boxed{00000100}
